example: A rabbit has long ears and a short tail.

example: Workers wore protective gear while removing the damaged roof.
exampleZh: 工人拆除受损屋顶时穿着防护装备。

example: I found it best to say nothing about the matter.
exampleZh: 我觉得什么都不说是最好的。

example: The two species are genetically distinct despite their similar appearance.
exampleZh: 尽管外表相似，这两个物种在遗传上截然不同。

example: My boss assigned the hard job to me.
exampleZh: 我老板把艰巨的任务指派给了我。

example: I think he is something of a poet.
exampleZh: 我觉得他有几分像个诗人。

example: The gang was planning a robbery.
exampleZh: 这伙人计划抢劫。

example: The black jacket has become a classic of modern design.
exampleZh: 这件黑色夹克已成为现代设计的经典。

example: Tom picked up the jar and read the label.
exampleZh: 汤姆拿起罐子读标签。

example: Heavy rainfall caused widespread flooding across the region.
exampleZh: 强降雨在整个地区造成了大范围洪水。

example: I worked in a post office during the summer vacation.
exampleZh: 暑假期间，我在邮局工作。

example: The red and blue lines represent temperature and rainfall respectively.
exampleZh: 红线和蓝线分别代表温度与降雨。

example: I am writing a draft of the speech.
exampleZh: 我在写演讲的草稿。

example: Tom is an extraordinary man.
exampleZh: 汤姆是个不寻常的人。

example: My father always said that heaven helps those who help themselves.
exampleZh: 我父亲总是说天助自助者。

example: He amassed a fortune in stock trading during the last boom.
exampleZh: 他在上个景气时期炒股攒下了一笔钱。

example: I didn't mean to yell.
exampleZh: 我没想叫的。

example: A distant light appeared beyond the dark forest.
exampleZh: 黑暗森林外出现了一束远处的光。

example: Tom is anxious to know the result.
exampleZh: 汤姆急着想知道结果。

example: The moon is the earth's only satellite.
exampleZh: 月球是地球唯一的卫星。

example: The warrior is conscious of both his strength and his weakness.
exampleZh: 战士知道自己的力量和弱点。

example: You have to sweep the floor.
exampleZh: 你必须扫地。

example: Employment remained stable despite weaker economic growth.
exampleZh: 尽管经济增长放缓，就业仍保持稳定。

example: A fly can walk on the ceiling.
exampleZh: 苍蝇能在天花板上走。

example: English is a universal language and is used all over the world.
exampleZh: 英语是一种世界性的语言，用于世界各地。

example: Customers can record their seating preference when booking.
exampleZh: 顾客预订时可以记录座位偏好。

example: The dancer began to spin across the empty stage.
exampleZh: 舞者开始在空舞台上旋转。

example: In case of fire, break the glass and push the red button.
exampleZh: 万一发生火灾，打碎玻璃并按下红色按钮。

example: The market offers super fresh fruit at reasonable prices.
exampleZh: 市场以合理价格出售非常新鲜的水果。

example: You must not yield to temptation.
exampleZh: 你不应该屈服在诱惑之下。

example: This is a good place to pitch a tent.
exampleZh: 这是搭帐篷的好地方。

example: She was too short to see over the fence.
exampleZh: 她太矮了，看不到围墙外面。

example: The gallery displayed a portrait of the young scientist.
exampleZh: 画廊展出了一幅年轻科学家的肖像。

example: A sudden fever may be an indication of infection.
exampleZh: 突然发烧可能是感染的征兆。

example: Asia is roughly four times the size of Europe.
exampleZh: 亚洲的大小约四倍于欧洲。

example: The young man saved the girl from a bunch of hoodlums.
exampleZh: 该名青年将少女从流氓团伙中救了出来。

example: The committee released new guidance concerning workplace safety.
exampleZh: 委员会发布了有关工作场所安全的新指南。

example: The service here is awful.
exampleZh: 这里的服务很糟糕。

example: Volunteers distribute hot meals to elderly residents every evening.
exampleZh: 志愿者每天晚上向老年居民分发热饭。

example: High rent places a heavy burden on young families.
exampleZh: 高房租给年轻家庭带来沉重负担。

example: Tom was too surprised to react.
exampleZh: 汤姆惊讶得没有反应。

example: Accurate measurement is essential when mixing these chemicals.
exampleZh: 混合这些化学品时，准确测量至关重要。

example: The ceremony will take place tomorrow.
exampleZh: 明天举行典礼。

example: Tom says he can communicate with the dead.
exampleZh: Tom说他可以通灵。

example: The document proves legal ownership of the land.
exampleZh: 这份文件证明了土地的合法所有权。

example: Tom doesn't share Mary's enthusiasm.
exampleZh: 汤姆没有感受到玛丽的热情。

example: They consider it impolite to disagree with someone they don't know very well.
exampleZh: 他们认为，去反驳一个不认识的人有些不礼貌。

example: His memory never ceases to astonish me.
exampleZh: 他的记忆力总让我吃惊。

example: You've both been very impressive today. I'm proud of you.
exampleZh: 今天你们俩很让人印象深刻。我为你们感到骄傲。

example: Completing the difficult repair gave her great satisfaction.
exampleZh: 完成这项困难维修让她非常满足。

example: The coastal town developed into a popular holiday resort.
exampleZh: 这座沿海小镇发展成了受欢迎的度假胜地。

example: We sat talking about the remote past.
exampleZh: 我们坐着谈很久以前的事。

example: War brought widespread destruction to the historic city.
exampleZh: 战争给这座历史城市带来了广泛破坏。

example: He was considered very qualified for the job.
exampleZh: 人们认为，他完全能胜任这个工作。

example: Doctors examined a small tissue sample under the microscope.
exampleZh: 医生在显微镜下检查了一小块组织样本。

example: Take the medicine at an interval of six hours.
exampleZh: 每隔六小时服用一次这种药。

example: I want to buy a pair of pants.
exampleZh: 我想买条裤子。

example: A stranger is just a friend you haven't met yet.
exampleZh: 所谓陌生人，只是还未相见的友人而已。

example: She dreamed that she was a princess.
exampleZh: 她梦见她是一个公主。

example: Conflicting instructions caused confusion among the rescue teams.
exampleZh: 相互冲突的指示让救援队感到困惑。

example: I provided him with food.
exampleZh: 我提供了他食物。

example: The telephone operator asked the caller to hold on until a connection was made.
exampleZh: 电话运营商提示来电人等候接通。

example: The computer has a virus.
exampleZh: 那台电脑中毒了。

example: The port occupies a strategic position near major shipping routes.
exampleZh: 该港口位于主要航线附近的战略位置。

example: The warehouse provides cold storage for fresh food.
exampleZh: 仓库为新鲜食品提供冷藏空间。

example: He made me his own assistant.
exampleZh: 他让我做他的助理。

example: Swimming strengthens the legs.
exampleZh: 游泳使腿部强健。

example: The report begins with a concise summary of its findings.
exampleZh: 报告开头简要概述了研究发现。

example: Tom carefully wiped his fingerprints off the knife.
exampleZh: 汤姆小心翼翼地把刀子上的指纹擦掉。

example: I encountered a problem.
exampleZh: 我遇到了故障。

example: You like to talk about architecture, don't you?
exampleZh: 你喜欢讨论建筑，不是吗？

example: Tom almost always uses a credit card when he goes shopping.
exampleZh: 汤姆在去购物的时候，几乎每次都会用信用卡。
